reason: The scoped content task owns the deterministic whitelist but not the production consumers that currently read full catalogs.

content_contract.acquisition_rule: Only manifest.acquisition_card_ids() (.rank_1) may seed draw/acquisition universes; ranks II-IV remain same-family upgrade records.

observed_production_state.rank_record_draw_risk: NOT_PRESENT: both regional supply and the default commodity belt filter rank I.

requested_owner_work.requirement: Intersect the canonical rank-I regional supply descriptors with the 28 non-commodity acquisition IDs from the Alpha manifest; keep deterministic ordering and no future-bag exposure.
Limit belt candidates to the 12 selected commodity rank-I IDs before deterministic eight-entry seeding; do not make rank II-IV directly drawable.
Expose only the eight selected source roles while preserving their authoritative source indices [0,1,2,3,9,16,21,22] and Chinese-name save identity; do not remap them to unsafe local save indices.

already_at_parity.monsters: The Alpha selection is the complete eight-monster runtime roster.
already_at_parity.products: The Alpha selection is the complete 46-product economy catalog.

acceptance_gates: The focused Alpha manifest test passes with the pinned selection and dependency hashes.
Player acquisition surfaces expose 40 identities total, not 160 rank records.
The regional supply universe is exactly the selected 28 non-commodity rank-I IDs.
Commodity acquisition uses only the selected 12 commodity rank-I IDs.
Setup exposes exactly the selected eight roles while save identity remains source-stable.
Every selected role mechanical passive field resolves to the audited non-Main gameplay consumer allowlist.
No organization card or retired mechanic enters an active pool.
Hidden hands, cash, AI reasoning, route plans, starter-monster choices, and ownership remain private.
boundary_confirmation: This content-curation commit does not modify Main, GameRuntimeCoordinator, GameScreen, economy owners, card-execution owners, or any production consumer.
